name: bee-express
description: BeeExpress — uch tomonlama marketplace + delivery platformasi (server + 4 panel + bot).

scripts.build: concurrently -n server,admin,client,seller,courier,bot -c bgGreen.black,bgMagenta.black,bgCyan.black,bgBlue.black,bgRed.black,bgYellow.black "npm --prefix server build" "npm --prefix admin build" "npm --prefix client build" "npm --prefix seller build" "npm --prefix courier build" "npm --prefix bot build"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix bot install && npm --prefix admin install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix seller install && npm --prefix courier install
